{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

| native_name = 大鳥井瀬神社

| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotoriwiseno Shrine'''|大鳥井瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]].
